name: Nonresident Alien De Minimis Service Income Exclusion

eligibility.description: Nonresident alien must be in the U.S. for ≤ 90 days during the tax year, compensation must be ≤ $3,000, and the employer must be a foreign entity not engaged in U.S. trade/business or a foreign office of a U.S. entity.

description: Compensation for labor or services performed in the U.S. by a nonresident alien is excluded from U.S. source income if specific time and dollar thresholds are met.
